sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Interesting! There are still 20 gray (w) objects remaining - all on the left panel (cols 8, 13, 18, 23). Looking at the ASCII, I can see the left panel buttons are still "w" (light gray), while the right panel buttons are now "B" (black).
But wait - I clicked on the left panel buttons too! The centers I clicked included (36, 8), (36, 13), (36, 18), (36, 23), etc. But they're still showing as "w".
Looking more carefully at the ASCII:
- Row 33: ggggggBBBggBBBggBBBggBBBggggg (right side buttons are BBB, left side has no buttons on this row)
- Row 35-37: gggggggwggggwggggwggggwgggggg (left side vertical bars still "w")
- Row 39: ggggggwwwggwwwggwwwggwwwggggg (left side horizontal bars still "w")
Wait, the left panel buttons are on a "g" (gray) background, not a "W" (white) background like the right panel. Maybe clicking them requires different coordinates or the segmentation is different?
Actually, looking at the boundaries:
- id=66: boundary=[[35, 8], [37, 8]] - this is a vertical bar at col 8, rows 35-37
- id=74: boundary=[[39, 7], [39, 9]] - this is a horizontal bar at row 39, cols 7-9
The center calculation gives (36, 8) for the vertical bar and (39, 8) for the horizontal bar. I clicked (36, 8) but it didn't work.
Wait, maybe the issue is that these buttons are on a different background (g vs W). Or maybe the buttons on the left panel are actually a different color? Let me check...
Looking at the ASCII, the left panel buttons are "w" (light gray) on a "g" (gray) background. The right panel buttons were also "w" on a "W" (white) background. So the button color is the same.
Hmm, but I did click (36, 8) and it didn't change. Let me try clicking again on one of these buttons to see if it works.
Actually wait - looking at the executed actions, I see MOUSE(row=36, col=8) was executed. But the button is still there. Maybe the click didn't register because of some issue with the coordinates?
Let me try clicking the exact boundary coordinates instead of the center. For id=66, the boundary is [[35, 8], [37, 8]], so the bar spans rows 35-37 at col 8. Let me try clicking (36, 8) again, or maybe (35, 8).
Actually, I think the issue might be that the batch action didn't properly process all clicks, or there's some timing issue. Let me try clicking one left panel button individually to see if it works.

sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content:
World model: 20 gray buttons remain on the left panel (cols 8, 13, 18, 23). Right panel buttons all cleared. Left panel buttons on gray (g) background didn't clear when clicked in batch.
Goal model: Need to clear remaining 20 left panel buttons, then click blue blob.
Plan: Try clicking one left panel button individually to debug why batch didn't work, then clear all remaining.
